reviews.text:
It’s nothing short of disturbing that Jose Jordan continues to manipulate his audience on his Spanish-language radio show, peddling the myth of amnesty as if it were a political certainty. For years now, he’s made a lucrative business out of selling hope, false hope, that is. Listening to his show, you’d think a sweeping, miraculous amnesty was around the corner, just waiting to relieve millions of families from their plight. Yet here we are, years into this presidency, and it has yielded nothing but vague promises, confusion, and an overwhelming humanitarian crisis. J.Jordan seems more interested in profiting off his listeners’ desperation than actually providing clear, honest guidance.

Worse still, he rarely addresses the dangers and challenges that have come with this open-border approach. Countless people crossing unvetted and unchecked is a recipe for disaster, not only for public safety but for the very people trying to find refuge in a broken system. But that doesn’t stop Jose Jordan from spinning his web of “just wait a little longer” assurances. He speaks as though Washington’s hand is reaching out, ready to deliver amnesty any day now, but his words are hollow, empty promises designed to keep people tuning in, holding on, and paying for consultations that lead nowhere.

It’s clear Jose Jordan lacks the integrity that any good attorney or advocate should have. He’s not helping; he’s exploiting. His show is a thinly veiled sales pitch, feeding off people’s hopes while knowing full well that the promises he implies are unlikely, if not impossible. This is not advocacy; it’s manipulation, and it’s downright shameful. A responsible attorney would counsel his audience honestly about the limitations and uncertainties of the immigration process, not pander to their fears and dreams just to fill his own pockets.

In short, Jordan's radio show is a deeply unethical venture that preys on the most vulnerable, those who want nothing more than a safe, legal path to a better life. He should be ashamed, but unfortunately, it seems his moral compass has long since abandoned him.

Now, the new Administration will carry out a massive deportation operation, yet Jose will never blame the Democrats for such disaster.

reviews.text:
Let me first start out by saying finding Chris Langley was a life saver!

When it comes to home ownership, an HOA or Association of Home Owners in my opinion is nothing more than a Mafia extorting "protection" from everyone in the neighborhood. How can this be a group of home owners when all these associations do is try to extort money from hard working people.

I personally had a situation that would shock most people. In a new construction community we were required to complete our landscape within a 6 month period. I tried to do this with great efforts however the HOA kept denying our plans stating reasons that did NOT apply to our plans. Like stating pilasters have to be over a specific height, when in fact they were outlined beyond that height. They were causing the delay, which resulted in fines I clearly did not agree with. Those fines I refused to pay, the HOA would escalate to about $3,000 of which they would then place a lien on my title for. A month later they would then add more fines to the fines and instead of removing the 1st lien and place a new updated lien. They would place a 2nd lien with the combined amount as if they were two separate amounts due. This went on until they had many liens. $3,000... $5,000...$6,000... $13,000...then get this, attorney fees $30,000. So I filed a chapter 7 with motions to strip judgement liens. The chapter 7 was discharged and the judicial liens were stripped. This mafia of an HOA ignored the court orders entirely. My house sold and the HOA contacted escrow and Title directly and forced escrow to send them $80,000. Wow, $80,000!!!

I contacted many attorneys and none truly understood the situation. Nor did they see how the HOA violated all bankruptcy laws by what they did. I was referred to Chris Langley and within a 10 minute call, he was the first person to know exactly what to do about my situation. He explained he created the case law that proves that all the liens "merged" into the final judgement amount that the judge stripped, meaning the HOA could NOT collect on ANY part of the lien amounts, nor add any fees on top of it based on the discharge. With a few emails to the HOA, he had them write a check for the full amount back to us!

Very few attorneys have what it takes to stand up for home owners and protect them from HOA's that believe they are gods and get to do what ever they wish. I can't thank Chris enough. This amount gives our family a path to start over and in the end, the HOA got what they deserved, NOTHING.
Christopher Langley is a great lawyer. Smart and efficient.
